variants.title: Donaldson P562287 Diffuser
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P562287 Diffuser is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Diffuser, Outer Diameter: 86.0 mm, Length: 76.0 mm, Thread: 3/4 NPT
